texto: When I saw 'Independence Day,' I said, 'I want to be like Will Smith.' I want to do something like that. If he can do it, maybe one day I can come close to a set like that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cory Hardrict: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “When I saw 'Independence Day,' I said, 'I want to be like Will Smith.' I want to do something lik…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, day, want pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e want.

frase_original: When I saw 'Independence Day,' I said, 'I want to be like Will Smith.' I want to do something like that. If he can do it, maybe one day I can come close to a set like that.

texto: I believe family first. Blood is thicker than water. I grew up like that, and I want to continue to keep that goal in my heart. Just family first! Just honesty, integrity, and respect. All of that. I live by the code of those things. If you do that you'll be fine.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cory Hardrict: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I believe family first. Blood is thicker than water. I grew up like that, and I want to continue …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, family, integrity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de integrity e water.

frase_original: I believe family first. Blood is thicker than water. I grew up like that, and I want to continue to keep that goal in my heart. Just family first! Just honesty, integrity, and respect. All of that. I live by the code of those things. If you do that you'll be fine.
